## Problem

What user need or project goal does this address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature at a high level.

## Responsible-Use Considerations

Explain why the feature fits CivicSec Lab's defensive, educational, and public-interest purpose.

## Alternatives

Describe alternatives considered.
